title: Another jolt to BJP in Tamil Nadu? Amar Prasad Reddy resigns to join Annamalai, says ‘I swallowed my personal pride’
description: Tamil Nadu state secretary Amar Prasad Reddy resigned from the party on Wednesday, and said, “I have resigned from the @BJP4India and will be joining Thalaivar @annamalai_k avargal in his journey ahead.”
